items.title: Anker Prime 3-in-1 Wireless Charging Station review: Fast, portable, & smart
items.summary: The Anker Prime 3-in-1 Wireless Charging Station is a fantastic portable charger that is MagSafe -compatible, delivering up to 25W of power to your iPhone, while simultaneously charging your AirPods and Apple Watch. Anker Prime 3-in-1...

items.title: DOJ antitrust case goes to South Korea in latest evidence request from Apple
items.summary: Samsung America has refused to submit evidence owned by its South Korean parent company, so Apple has turned to the Hague Conventions to force the matter. Apple requests Samsung provide evidence even if it's in South Korea In March 2024,...

items.title: Apple seeks internal data from Samsung in South Korea in ongoing antitrust case
items.summary: Apple has moved to obtain internal Samsung data from South Korea in its ongoing antitrust fight with the U.S. government over alleged monopoly practices. Here are the details.

items.title: Stolen Device Protection for enterprise & Apple Passwords sync fix are in iOS 26.4.1
items.summary: Apple's iOS 26.4.1 includes bug fixes for Apple Passwords and enables Stolen Device Protection for enterprise users by default. iOS 26.4.1 includes a fix related to iCloud data syncing. Following the public release of iOS 26.4 on March 24,...

items.title: Stolen Device Protection now enabled by default for enterprise devices in iOS 26.4.1
items.summary: Apple confirms that Stolen Device Protection will be enabled by default for enterprise devices updating from iOS 26.4 to iOS 26.4.1, and from iPadOS 26.4 to iPadOS 26.4.1. Here are the details.

items.title: TSLA stock slides, Supercharger prices, and who's REALLY behind Elon's big chip fab
items.summary: On today's Tesla-tastic episode of Quick Charge , a TSLA bear thinks the stock is headed for a 60% slide before the year is out, Tesla launches a Supercharger configurator, and we find out what's really going on at Elon's proposed chip fab.

items.title: AI agent Poke makes setting up automations as easy as sending a text
items.summary: Poke brings AI agents to everyday users via text message by handling tasks and automations without complex setup, apps, or technical know-how.

items.title: Intel and SambaNova team up on heterogenous AI inference platform - different hardware performs different workloads
items.summary: Intel and SambaNova announce heterogeneous inference platform that can take advantage of Intel Xeon 6 CPUs, SambaNova SN50 RDUs, and Nvidia GPUs.
